title: No More Upgrade Templates
description: This mod allows you to upgrade your diamond tools to netherite without dying so many times and spending so much time searching for the upgrade templates
body:
# **No More Upgrade Templates**
**This mod allows you to upgrade your diamond tools to netherite without dying so many times and spending so much time searching for the upgrade templates**.

‼️Maybe can't work whit optifine‼️Try it

**Steps: See the galery photo for visual recipes.**

‼️All the tools are in the mod‼️
